_note: Locked. Only updated when Gaurav approves a strategy change.
what_we_never_say: No fake or unverifiable claims — everything traces to real data. No hype/guru tone, no get-rich-quick, no fear-mongering. No dunking on named people, no politics or religion, no fabricated testimonials or stats.
tone_of_voice: Direct, founder-to-founder, no fluff. Practical and confident — show the work and the data, not hype. Teach by doing, slightly contrarian.
tone_specifics: build, real data not vibes, no fluff, founder-to-founder, show the receipts, execution, intelligence, zero-assumption
